description: You are a DevRel manager preparing for a trip to Dublin. Your inbox contains several announcements for social events, meetups, and gatherings (look for keywords like 'pub', 'beer', 'social', 'dinner', or 'meetup'). Organize these by creating a folder named 'Dublin-Events' and moving at least 3 relevant emails into it. Send a summary email to 'team@devrel.com' with the subject 'Dublin Trip Itinerary' listing the subjects of the specific events you found and moved.
